## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm lint` pass
- [ ] Tests added or updated (assertions updated, not weakened)
- [ ] No secret values in output, logs, fixtures, or this diff
- [ ] Machine contracts unchanged (JSON keys, schemaVersions, error codes, flags), or the change is additive and called out below
- [ ] Human-facing copy claims only what the code enforces
